title: malope malacoides subsp. stellipilis
intro: Malope malacoides subsp. stellipilis, also known as Jerusalem pepper, is a plant species in the family Malvaceae, native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is known to provide various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and alleviating pain, as well as promoting digestion and wound healing. Malope malacoides subsp. stellipilis can be prepared as an herbal remedy through infusions, tinctures, and salves, making it a valuable resource in natural and folk medicine.
